title: BG Electrical Double Wall Light Switch, 2 Way, Raised and Slim Profile, Round Edges, Nexus Metal, Polished Chrome, 20A, 16AX, NPC42
features: DECORATIVE DOUBLE LIGHT SWITCH WITH RAISED PROFILE FROM THE BG NEXUS METAL RANGE: Slim, raised profile with softly rounded corners in polished chrome, with colour matching fixing screws for a super-stylish design
INTEGRATED MOISTURE GASKET CONTROL: Protects the metal edges from tarnishing. Ideal when using new plaster. No visible plastic around the switches
SUPER-EASY TO INSTALL IN ROOMS, LANDINGS OR HALLS: With 2-way switching, allowing you to have a second switch in the circuit. Ideal for at the top and bottom of the stairs

CAPTIVE BACKED-OUT TERMINAL SCREWS: Easy wire connection and terminal screws for fast installation and to prevent screw loss. All fixings included. Adheres to BS60669-1 regulations which ensures a safer electrical installation
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
